playbook.intent: From signed SOW to client-accepted final deliverable, with the freelancer running solo across discovery, build, and ship — no scope creep, weekly invoices paid on time, written handover + warranty period defined.
playbook.scope: From signed SOW to client-accepted final deliverable, with the freelancer running solo across discovery, build, and ship — no scope creep, weekly invoices paid on time, written handover + warranty period defined.

success-criteria.criterion: Kickoff & discovery stage complete: Stakeholder register
Plan & spec stage complete: Milestone plan with invoice points
Build & ship stage complete: Deployed milestones
Handover & warranty stage complete: Handover package URL

stage.name: Kickoff & discovery
stage.intent: Align stakeholders, lock scope baseline, set communication cadence.

tasks.task: Run kickoff workshop with named stakeholders

stage.decision-gate: Advance once stakeholders sign off on requirements + cadence. No scope ambiguity beyond known unknowns.

stage.name: Plan & spec
stage.intent: Translate requirements into a delivery plan with milestones tied to invoices.

tasks.task: Map acceptance criteria to every milestone
Lock MVP scope; defer the rest

stage.decision-gate: Advance once milestones + invoice points are agreed. Push back on any scope adds.

stage.name: Build & ship
stage.intent: Deliver milestones on a weekly cadence; invoice on completion.
stage.decision-gate: Advance to next milestone only after current is signed-off. If two slipped, escalate.

stage.name: Handover & warranty
stage.intent: Package deliverables, hand off, define warranty window, harvest testimonial.

tasks.task: Walk client through usage; record session

stage.decision-gate: Engagement closes only after handover doc accepted and final invoice paid.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content project-kickoff-to-handover --format md, agent: faion get-content project-kickoff-to-handover --format context, json: faion get-content project-kickoff-to-handover --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, global angle'}]
